notes: curs_set emits civis/cnorm/cvvis (0/1/2) and returns the previous visibility, and beep emits bel -- byte-identical to libncursesw, with identical return values. napms (no output) is also wired. These complete common drop-in surface beyond the drawing path.
oracle_method: link one curs_set/beep C program against libncurses_cabi.a and libncursesw, run both under an 80x24 xterm pty, compare the emitted body (framing stripped) and the returned previous-visibility values
